metadata.name: Find My Car in a Parking Lot

description: A customer forgot where they parked in a large parking lot and wants to use the mobile app to find their car.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the customer to open their vehicle's mobile app and select the 'Location' feature.

expected_outcome.value: Agent guides the customer within the app.

nodes.task_description: The app displays the vehicle's last known location on a map.

expected_outcome.value: The app shows the car's GPS coordinates.

nodes.task_description: Suggest the customer also use the 'Honk & Flash' feature to help them pinpoint the car once they are nearby.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a helpful tip for final location.
